superseded_reason: ID collision. tinker-2026-05-25T12-19 (morning run, DIRECTIVE-001 execution) authored the close-time mandatory-verification PROP as PROP-058 and wrote to its clone but the file never landed in git. tinker-2026-05-25T12-38 (afternoon run, DIRECTIVE-002 execution) then authored the blocked-on-curmudgeon burndown PROP as PROP-058 (no pre-author ID-collision scan) and committed it to git as commit 856ee7d. To resolve, the morning PROP was renumbered to PROP-059 and pushed in commit 35e5be7. This file is the FUSE-side stub left in place so workspace-sync doesn't re-push the original 14KB content. Operator may delete this stub at convenience.
